languages.text: "Полагаю, принудительная гальванизация нервной системы послужит достаточным аргументом для достижения консенсуса. Если вы не хотите умертвить этого... человека — тогда текущей степени воздействия достаточно".

"I believe forced galvanisation of the nervous system will serve as sufficient impetus to arrive at a consensus. If you don't wish to kill this... person, then the current level of severity is enough."
languages.original_text: "Полагаю, принудительная гальванизация нервной системы послужит достаточным аргументом для достижения консенсуса. Если вы не хотите умертвить этого... человека — тогда текущей степени воздействия достаточно".

traits.locale_text: "I believe forced galvanisation of the nervous system will serve as sufficient impetus to arrive at a consensus. If you don't wish to kill this... person, then the current level of severity is enough."

"I believe forced galvanisation of the nervous system will serve as sufficient impetus to arrive at a consensus. If you don't wish to kill this... person, then the current level of severity is enough."

"I believe forced galvanisation of the nervous system will serve as sufficient impetus to arrive at a consensus. If you don't wish to kill this... person, then the current level of severity is enough."

languages.text: «Creo que una galvanización forzosa del sistema nervioso bastará como motivación para alcanzar un consenso. Si no desea matar a esta... persona, el nivel actual de intensidad será suficiente».
languages.original_text: "I believe forced galvanisation of the nervous system will serve as sufficient impetus to arrive at a consensus. If you don't wish to kill this... person, then the current level of severity is enough."

traits.locale_text: «Creo que una galvanización forzosa del sistema nervioso bastará como motivación para alcanzar un consenso. Si no desea matar a esta... persona, el nivel actual de intensidad será suficiente».

languages.text: “我认为，对神经系统施以强制电激，足以形成达成共识的有效动力。如果您不想杀了这个……人，那当前的强度已经足够了。”
languages.original_text: "I believe forced galvanisation of the nervous system will serve as sufficient impetus to arrive at a consensus. If you don't wish to kill this... person, then the current level of severity is enough."

traits.locale_text: “我认为，对神经系统施以强制电激，足以形成达成共识的有效动力。如果您不想杀了这个……人，那当前的强度已经足够了。”

languages.text: « Je pense qu'une galvanisation forcée de son système nerveux sera une motivation suffisante pour parvenir à un accord. Si vous ne souhaitez pas tuer cet... individu, le niveau de sévérité actuel est suffisant. »
languages.original_text: "I believe forced galvanisation of the nervous system will serve as sufficient impetus to arrive at a consensus. If you don't wish to kill this... person, then the current level of severity is enough."

traits.locale_text: « Je pense qu'une galvanisation forcée de son système nerveux sera une motivation suffisante pour parvenir à un accord. Si vous ne souhaitez pas tuer cet... individu, le niveau de sévérité actuel est suffisant. »

languages.text: "Sinir sisteminin zorla galvanizlemesinin, fikir birliğine varmak için yeterli olacağına inanıyorum. Eğer bu... Kişiyi öldürmek istemiyorsanız mevcut şiddet seviyesi yeterlidir."
languages.original_text: "I believe forced galvanisation of the nervous system will serve as sufficient impetus to arrive at a consensus. If you don't wish to kill this... person, then the current level of severity is enough."

traits.locale_text: "Sinir sisteminin zorla galvanizlemesinin, fikir birliğine varmak için yeterli olacağına inanıyorum. Eğer bu... Kişiyi öldürmek istemiyorsanız mevcut şiddet seviyesi yeterlidir."

languages.text: 「神経系の強制的ガルヴァナイズが、合意に至るための十分な刺激となると私は考えます。この……人物を殺したくないのであれば、現在の苛烈さの程度で十分でしょう」
languages.original_text: "I believe forced galvanisation of the nervous system will serve as sufficient impetus to arrive at a consensus. If you don't wish to kill this... person, then the current level of severity is enough."

traits.locale_text: 「神経系の強制的ガルヴァナイズが、合意に至るための十分な刺激となると私は考えます。この……人物を殺したくないのであれば、現在の苛烈さの程度で十分でしょう」

languages.text: "Ich glaube, eine erzwungene Galvanisierung des Nervensystems ist ein hinreichender Impuls, einen Konsens zu finden. Wenn Ihr diese ... Person nicht töten wollt, reicht die derzeitige Spannung aus."
languages.original_text: "I believe forced galvanisation of the nervous system will serve as sufficient impetus to arrive at a consensus. If you don't wish to kill this... person, then the current level of severity is enough."

traits.locale_text: "Ich glaube, eine erzwungene Galvanisierung des Nervensystems ist ein hinreichender Impuls, einen Konsens zu finden. Wenn Ihr diese ... Person nicht töten wollt, reicht die derzeitige Spannung aus."
